one_time_description: Contribution from Mistawasis Specific Claim Trust - land acquisition
economic_notes: Nation holds 99.9% ownership in Misty Ventures Limited Partnership (MVLP) which operates on-reserve retail store and gas bar, property management services, selling and leasing storage containers, holding and evaluating investment and other economic development activities. Nation also holds investments in STC Casino Holdings Corp, STC Casino Holdings Limited Partnership, STC Investments Ltd, and STC Investments Limited Partnership at 14.4% each.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 (not 2024). Statement was signed September 9, 2020 and filed late per ISC requirements. COVID-19 noted as significant event impacting operations. Nation is in breach of ISC filing deadline. Misty Ventures Limited Partnership (MVLP) accounted for by modified equity method - net loss of 350,443 recorded. Mistawasis Specific Claim Trust excluded from consolidation as controlled by trustees. Nation is member of Saskatoon Tribal Council (STC). New Highschool funding of 4,830,400 excluded from ISC revenue reconciliation. Document appears to be fiscal year 2020 financial statements not 2024.
